description:
You are setting up GPredict for a three-campus university amateur radio satellite program in Colorado. Each campus has its own satellite antenna and needs its own tracking module showing pass predictions from its local perspective.

Create three ground stations with the following specifications:
- CU_Boulder: Latitude 40.0076 N, Longitude 105.2659 W, Altitude 1624 meters
- CSU_FortCollins: Latitude 40.5734 N, Longitude 105.0865 W, Altitude 1525 meters
- Mines_Golden: Latitude 39.7514 N, Longitude 105.2225 W, Altitude 1729 meters

Create three tracking modules named CU_Boulder, CSU_FortCollins, and Mines_Golden, assigning each to its corresponding campus ground station. All three modules must track the following four amateur voice satellites:
- ISS (ZARYA) - NORAD 25544
- SO-50 (SaudiSat 1C) - NORAD 27607
- AO-85 (Fox-1A) - NORAD 40967
- AO-95 (Fox-1Cliff) - NORAD 43770

Set CU_Boulder as the system default ground station and configure GPredict to display UTC time for all timestamps.

Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
